title: oxytropis revoluta subsp. kudoana
intro: Oxytropis revoluta subsp. kudoana is a sub-species of the Oxytropis revoluta plant, a type of legume native to mountainous regions in Japan. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oxytropis revoluta subsp. kudoana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a potential treatment for various ailments. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing its roots and stems into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
